title: CMPLX Agent Integration Review — Code Index + Real Paper Findings

phases.name: Discovery — Map Agent Outputs to Standards Surface
phases.description: Harvest and map the two Kimi agent outputs (code index + real paper findings) into the CMPLX-Standards model space.

work_items.title: Map code-indexing agent outputs to machine/analog supplement model
work_items.description: The code-indexing agent produced d_drive_code_index.json (207K+ files). Extract model-mappable records for: code_supplement, analog_workbook, machine_verifier artifacts. Map to appropriate papers.
acceptance_criteria: Code supplement records extracted and graded (fit >= 90)
Analog workbook records extracted and graded (fit >= 90)
Machine verifier records extracted and graded (fit >= 90)

work_items.title: Map real-paper findings agent outputs to assembled_paper extensions
work_items.description: The paper-findings agent produced paper_index.md (1,038 papers) and REAL-PAPERS/ (8 formal papers with real citations). Extract and map real academic references, external source links, and formal paper structures into CMPLX-Standards.
acceptance_criteria: Real academic references (Wolfram, Lucas, Conway, Borcherds, etc.) captured in model
Paper structure (abstract, theorems, references) mapped to model fields

phases.name: Integration — Update CMPLX-Standards Models
phases.description: Update existing models and create new models to capture both agents' outputs without regressing fit.

work_items.title: Create code_supplement model for machine-level artifacts
work_items.description: Create a new model or extension that captures code supplements, analog workbooks, and machine verifiers as first-class records. Reference existing ability_seed and legacy_repo_port models.
acceptance_criteria: Records created for key machine-level artifacts (lattice_forge, cqekernel, proof verifiers)

work_items.title: Update peer_review_metadata with real paper findings
work_items.description: Augment the peer_review_metadata model (created in P4-W1) with real academic references, external source validation, and cross-references to REAL-PAPERS/.
acceptance_criteria: Real academic references captured in peer_review_metadata records
External source links (DOI, arXiv, etc.) preserved
Cross-reference to REAL-PAPERS/ paper IDs established
No regression in base model fit

phases.name: Cross-Reference — Link Code and Paper Outputs
phases.description: Create cross-reference artifacts that link code supplements to papers and vice versa.

work_items.title: Create paper-to-code supplement cross-reference
work_items.description: For each paper in the FLCR suite, identify which code supplements, analog workbooks, and machine verifiers are applicable. Create a bidirectional mapping.
acceptance_criteria: At least one supplement mapped per FLCR paper

phases.name: Validation — Full Suite Re-run
phases.description: Re-run the full CMPLX-Standards grader to validate all new records and models.

work_items.title: Re-run CMPLX-Standards suite grader
work_items.description: Run cmplx_standards.py against all models including new code_supplement and updated peer_review_metadata. Verify fit >= 90 for all records and suite average >= 97.0.

success_criteria: Code supplement model created with fit >= 90
Peer review metadata updated with real references
